creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
When trying to install:

===>  Found saved configuration for firefox-i18n-22.0
===>   firefox-i18n-22.0 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> en-GB.xpi is not in /usr/ports/www/firefox-i18n/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/www/firefox-i18n/distinfo is out of date, or
=> en-GB.xpi is spelled incorrectly.
*** [do-fetch] Error code 1
